name: Project Management
description: Manages the list of projects, per-project metadata (descriptions, rules, MCP config, color), and project-level task lists. Provides helpers for current project selection and display.

Dialogs/CreateProjectDialog.cs.content:
class CreateProjectResult
  Name: string
  Path: string
  InitGit: bool
  IsGame: bool
class CreateProjectDialog
  Show() -> CreateProjectResult?

Dialogs/ProjectSettingsDialog.cs.content:
class ProjectSettingsDialog
  Show(ProjectEntry entry, Action saveProjects, Action? onMcpVisibilityChanged = null, ProjectManager? projectManager = null) -> void

Managers/ProjectManager.cs.content:
class ProjectManager
  SetTaskFactory(ITaskFactory taskFactory) -> void
  SetSettingsManager(SettingsManager settingsManager) -> void
  GetProjectStats(string projectPath, IEnumerable<AgentTask> allTasks) -> ProjectActivityStats
  LoadProjectsAsync() -> Task
  SaveProjects() -> void
  RefreshProjectCombo() -> void
  RefreshDescriptionBoxes() -> void
  HandleAddProjectPathClick(Action<string> updateTerminalWorkingDirectory, Action saveSettings, Action syncSettings) -> void
  AddProject(Action<string> updateTerminalWorkingDirectory, Action saveSettings, Action syncSettings) -> void
  CreateProject(Action<string> updateTerminalWorkingDirectory, Action saveSettings, Action syncSettings) -> void
  UpdateMcpToggleForProject() -> void
  GetCurrentProject() -> ProjectEntry?
  GetProjectColor(string projectPath) -> string
  GetProjectDisplayName(string projectPath) -> string
  IsGameProject(string projectPath) -> bool
  GetProjectDescription(AgentTask task) -> string
  RegenerateDescriptions() -> void
  SaveShortDesc() -> void
  SaveLongDesc() -> void

Managers/ProjectTaskManager.cs.content:
class ProjectTaskManager
  LoadTasksAsync() -> Task
  SaveTasks() -> void
  SaveTasksAsync() -> Task
  AddTask(string text) -> ProjectTaskItem
  CompleteTask(ProjectTaskItem task) -> void
  RemoveTask(ProjectTaskItem task) -> void

Models/ProjectEntry.cs.content:
enum McpStatus
    Disabled, NotConnected, Connecting, Connected, Failed, Initialized, Investigating
class ProjectEntry
  Name: string
  Path: string
  McpStatus: McpStatus
  McpServerName: string
  McpAddress: string
  McpStartCommand: string
  ShortDescription: string
  LongDescription: string
  RuleInstruction: string
  ProjectRules: List<string>
  Color: string
  IsGame: bool
  CrashLogPath: string
  AppLogPath: string
  HangLogPath: string
  IsInitializing: bool
  McpProcessId: int

patterns: Per-project color palette from fixed set
